# Visit us at 350 Burnhamthorpe Road West, Mississauga, ON L5B 3J1 [map marker pin](https://alioli.com/\#map-v3-container)

# Alioli Ristorante

## SERVING MISSISSAUGA SINCE 1996

Welcome to Alioli Ristorante, where passion for authentic Italian cuisine has thrived in Mississauga since 1996! As a family-run establishment, we pride ourselves on creating a warm, inviting atmosphere perfect for gatherings of all kinds.

[Read more  about us](https://alioli.com/mississauga-alioli-ristorante-about)

## Massimo, Gianni, Alireza and the staff welcome you to Alioli Ristorante.

# Reservations

## Join us today

Book a table and make some memories.

[Reserve](https://www.opentable.ca/restref/client/?restref=5946&lang=en-&corrid=c901600b-c01d-4b36-a60f-a38ee9bcd7ac)

# Order Online

## Order online and enjoy!

Your favourite food is just a click away.

[order online](https://alioli.gpr.globalpaymentsinc.ca/menu)

# Private Parties

## Host your next party with us

Alioli Ristorante has the perfect space for birthday bashes, holiday parties, corporate events, wedding festivities, and more!

[Parties](https://alioli.com/mississauga-alioli-ristorante-party)

# Testimonial

## Hi Massimo and Team

I just wanted to send you a note and thank your entire team for the wonderful experience we had during our holiday party. You have such an amazing group of men on your team and they went above and beyond to deliver a one-of-a-kind experience. I have never experienced the kind of hospitality that I did on Friday. The food was absolutely amazing as well! I have received so many compliments from my colleagues about the party. I couldn't have done it without you boys. I'm looking forward to seeing you all again soon.

### five star review by  Ali k:

web.title: Michael's Back Door | Italian Restaurant, Mississauga
web.description: Serving award winning Italian cuisine in Mississauga since 1981 · OUR CLASSIC DISHES · CAPELLI DI ANGELI · LINGUINE FRUTTI DI MARE · VITELLO SORRENTINA · CONTACT US.
web.markdown:
top of page

Skip to Main Content

HOME

![DSC_0011.JPG](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/c63e76_5bfbb445f88e40e3acbc3a206ae1e5f7~mv2.jpg/v1/fill/w_1905,h_993,al_c,q_85,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/c63e76_5bfbb445f88e40e3acbc3a206ae1e5f7~mv2.jpg)

# Serving award winning Italian cuisine in Mississauga since 1981

# REDISCOVER A CLASSIC

[MENU](https://www.michaelsbackdoor.com/menus)

[RESERVATIONS](https://www.michaelsbackdoor.com/reservations)

[TAKEOUT AND DELIVERY](https://www.michaelsbackdoor.com/delivery)

MENUS

## OUR CLASSIC DISHES

Since opening in 1981 these classic dishes have been long-time favourites and are still featured on our menus today.

## CAPELLI DI ANGELI

Our Capelli di Angeli with lobster sauce has been the most popular dish since 1985. This delicious dish is made with fresh lobster meat and served with delicate angel hair pasta, creating a perfect balance of flavours.

## LINGUINE FRUTTI DI MARE

This linguine pasta dish (shown in photo) featuring fresh shrimp, scallops, mussels and clams in a white wine garlic basil tomato sauce has been a seafood lovers dream since 1981.

## VITELLO SORRENTINA

Veal Scaloppine can come in many forms but this classic Italian dish features tender veal topped with eggplant, capicollo and bocconcini cheese in basil garlic tomato sauce.

![Signature Angel Hair Lobster Pasta](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/a1b73b_2c77916f00534e428f3cd82a6bd612c3~mv2.png/v1/fill/w_125,h_126,al_c,q_85,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/a1b73b_2c77916f00534e428f3cd82a6bd612c3~mv2.png)

![Linguine Frutti di Mare](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/de5e90_c4061bb01c5347bc817c21ecbae952e5~mv2.jpg/v1/fill/w_126,h_126,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/de5e90_c4061bb01c5347bc817c21ecbae952e5~mv2.jpg)

![Veal Sorrentina](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/de5e90_ce0b7f4c0d23400ea97435157e7f7306~mv2.jpg/v1/fill/w_133,h_100,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/de5e90_ce0b7f4c0d23400ea97435157e7f7306~mv2.jpg)

[MENUS](https://www.michaelsbackdoor.com/menus)

#### RESERVATIONS

We are very pleased to offer reservations online and by phone!

Thank you so much for all of your continued support!

[CALL US NOW](tel:+1-905-822-5751)

[RESERVATIONS](https://www.michaelsbackdoor.com/reservations)

SPECIALS

## CONTACT US

Tel: [905-822-5751](tel:+1-905-822-5751)  \|  Email: michael[@michaelsbackdoor.com](mailto:michael@michaelsbackdoor.com)

## LOCATION

1715 Lakeshore Road West, Mississauga, ON

​

## HOURS

​

Monday: Closed

Tuesday-Thursday: 5:00pm to 9:00pm

Friday-Saturday: 5:00pm to 10:00pm

         Sunday: 5:00pm-9:00pm

​

web.title: Authentic Italian Restaurant in Mississauga - Fiamma Ristorante
web.description: Welcome to Fiamma Ristorante, Mississauga's destination for authentic Italian cuisine that transports you straight to Italy.
web.markdown:
# Fiamma Ristorante: Your Go-To Italian Restaurant in Mississauga for Authentic Italian Flavors

## Welcome to **Fiamma Ristorante**, Mississauga’s destination for authentic Italian cuisine that transports you straight to Italy.

[![spaghetti bolognese - a dish at fiamma ristorante italian restaurant mississauga bringing italian flavours to canada](https://fiammaristorante.ca/wp-content/uploads/2024/10/fiamma-ristorante-italian-restaurant-mississauga-italian-flavours-spaghetti-bolognese-1-1024x900.jpg)](https://www.instagram.com/fiammaristorante.ca/)

#### Why Choose Fiamma Ristorante for Authentic Italian Dining

At Fiamma Ristorante we don’t just serve Italian food, we celebrate it. Our menu highlights the timeless recipes of Italy with a modern touch, using only the finest ingredients to create unforgettable dishes. Each meal is crafted with authenticity, flavor, and freshness in mind, making us the most beloved Italian Restaurant in Mississauga.

#### The Charm of Italian Cuisine at Fiamma Ristorante

Italian cuisine holds a universal appeal because of its simplicity, quality ingredients, and the warmth it brings to the dining experience. At Fiamma, we honor Italy’s culinary traditions with dishes that emphasize flavor, balance, and the pure joy of sharing a meal with friends and family.

#### How Fiamma Brings True Italian Flavors to Mississauga

Fiamma Ristorante focuses on authentic recipes that showcase Italy’s rich culinary heritage. We use traditional cooking techniques and handpicked ingredients, many of which are sourced directly from Italy, to ensure our guests experience the most genuine flavors possible.

#### [Signature Dishes at Fiamma Ristorante](https://fiammaristorante.ca/menu/)

Our menu offers a variety of classic Italian dishes, each with a unique Fiamma twist. Here are a few must-try items:

##### Housemade Lasagna

Our lasagna is crafted with layers of tender pasta, rich tomato sauce, creamy ricotta, and melted cheese. It’s the perfect comfort food for any occasion and a top choice among our guests.

##### Margherita Pizza

Fiamma’s Margherita pizza is a classic with a thin crust, fresh mozzarella, tomatoes, and basil. This pizza is simplicity at its best, allowing the ingredients to shine.

##### Tagliatelle Carbonara

Made with delicious Italian pasta, pancetta, eggs, and pecorino cheese, our Tagliatelle Carbonara is a creamy, indulgent delight. It’s one of the most authentic Italian dishes you’ll find on our menu.

#### [![margherita pizza - a dish at fiamma ristorante italian restaurant mississauga bringing italian flavours to canada](<Base64-Image-Removed>)](https://www.instagram.com/fiammaristorante.ca/)

#### A Cozy and Inviting Ambiance at Fiamma

The dining experience at Fiamma goes beyond just food. Our ambiance is designed to give guests a warm, inviting atmosphere reminiscent of a traditional Italian trattoria. With rustic decor, dim lighting, and an open kitchen, we bring the feel of Italy right to Mississauga.

#### Quality Ingredients: The Core of Fiamma’s Culinary Excellence

We believe that great food starts with great ingredients. Fiamma is committed to sourcing fresh, high-quality produce, meats, and cheeses. Many of our specialty ingredients are imported directly from Italy, including premium olive oil, fresh mozzarella, and Italian herbs, bringing the authentic flavors of Italy to each dish.

#### Customer Favorites at Fiamma Ristorante

Our loyal guests keep coming back for the dishes they love, making some items on our menu instant classics. Dishes like our Fettuccine Bolognese and Pollo alla Parmigiana are among the crowd-pleasers you don’t want to miss.

#### [![](<Base64-Image-Removed>)](https://www.instagram.com/fiammaristorante.ca/)

#### Family-Friendly Dining at Fiamma

Fiamma Ristorante is a fantastic choice for families. Our relaxed environment and kid-friendly menu options, like cheese pizza and spaghetti, make dining with family a joyful experience. We welcome families to come together and enjoy a shared meal in true Italian fashion.

#### Vegan and Vegetarian Options for Every Palate

We understand the importance of offering plant-based and vegetarian options, so everyone has something delicious to enjoy. From our Marinara pizza to vegetable-based pastas, our menu has plenty of options to suit vegan and vegetarian diets without compromising on flavor.

#### Savoring Authentic Italian Desserts

At Fiamma, no meal is complete without dessert. We offer classic Italian sweets like **Tiramisu** and **Panna Cotta** that are made in-house with high-quality ingredients. Each dessert brings a sweet finish to your Italian dining experience.

#### Our Commitment to Fresh, Local, and Imported Ingredients

We take pride in our ingredient sourcing at Fiamma. While we support local farmers and suppliers, we also import some ingredients directly from Italy to ensure authentic flavors in every dish. Our commitment to quality is what makes each bite a true Italian experience.

#### [![](<Base64-Image-Removed>)](https://www.instagram.com/fiammaristorante.ca/)

#### Wine Pairing Tips at Fiamma Ristorante

A good meal deserves the perfect wine pairing. At Fiamma, we offer a selection of Italian and local wines that complement our dishes. Here are a few pairing suggestions:

- **Red wine** with tomato-based dishes like pasta and pizza.
- **White wine** with seafood and risotto dishes.
- **Sweet dessert wines** with our Tiramisu or other Italian desserts.

Our knowledgeable staff is always ready to recommend the best wine to accompany your meal.

#### How to Order Like an Italian Food Enthusiast

When dining at Fiamma, don’t hesitate to explore the menu and ask for recommendations. Italian meals are meant to be savored slowly, so try starting with an appetizer like bruschetta or calamari, followed by a main course and dessert for the full experience.

## Join us for dinner

Fiamma Ristorante is more than just a place to eat; it’s a culinary journey to Italy. Our dedication to authenticity, quality, and hospitality makes us a top choice for Italian food in Mississauga. Whether you’re dining with family, enjoying a date night, or simply indulging in the flavors of Italy, Fiamma offers an experience that’s memorable and delicious. Visit us to taste Italy without leaving Mississauga!

[RESERVE A TABLE](tel:14166222000)

## Frequently Asked Questions

[Does Fiamma Ristorante offer takeout?](https://fiammaristorante.ca/fiamma-ristorante-your-go-to-italian-restaurant-in-mississauga-for-authentic-italian-flavors/#collapse-726c8ec69e637dc0514b)

Yes! You can order takeout and enjoy our Italian dishes at home by calling 416-622-2000

[Can I find vegetarian options at Fiamma?](https://fiammaristorante.ca/fiamma-ristorante-your-go-to-italian-restaurant-in-mississauga-for-authentic-italian-flavors/#collapse-680d9a969e637dc0514b)

Yes, Italian cuisine offers a wide range of vegetarian dishes, and at Fiamma in Mississauga, we are well-equipped to accommodate vegetarian preferences. From vegetarian pizza options to fresh Caprese salads, you'll find plenty of flavorful and satisfying options to choose from.

[Do Italian restaurants offer gluten-free dishes?](https://fiammaristorante.ca/fiamma-ristorante-your-go-to-italian-restaurant-in-mississauga-for-authentic-italian-flavors/#collapse-51b6ea969e637dc0514b)

Many Italian restaurants in Missisauga understand the importance of catering to different dietary needs, and Fiamma is no exception. We have gluten-free options available, such as gluten-free pasta or pizza crusts. It's always advisable to inform the restaurant about your dietary restrictions in advance, so they can accommodate your needs.

[Can I host a private event in Mississauga at Fiamma?](https://fiammaristorante.ca/fiamma-ristorante-your-go-to-italian-restaurant-in-mississauga-for-authentic-italian-flavors/#collapse-7d97b3669e637dc0514b)

We pride ourselves on providing a memorable dining experience for everyone that walks through our door. We host private corporate events, family celebrations and cocktail parties of all sizes. You name it we can do it. There are a variety of private and semi-private areas available for meetings, business dinners, receptions, cocktail parties, engagement parties, weddings, birthday celebrations, team building, presentations and more. Call us to discuss your next private event and how we can make it unforgettable: 416-622-2000

[CONTACT US](https://fiammaristorante.ca/contact/)

## We look forward to welcoming you at FiAMMA Ristorante

Reservations can be made by calling us at 416-622-2000

[RESERVE A TABLE](tel:14166222000)

Please take a moment to fill out our VIP Newsletter Member form below. VIP Newsletter Members receive access to a wide range of exclusive benefits which include automatic entry into all of our contests, compliments from Capra's Kitchen on your birthday and/or anniversary, invitations to cocktail evenings, periodical newsletters and other special promotions from Capra's Kitchen. ## About

Capra's Kitchen is a casual, modern, urban restaurant that serves antipasto, pasta, and pizza, along with meat, fish, and vegetarian/vegan options.

We offer a number of brunch options on weekends.

We consider ourselves to be a very fresh approachable restaurant with a wonderful team of staff.

Our food is sourced locally whenever possible and we also use high quality ingredients from Italy and Canada.

[Back to Top](https://www.capraskitchen.com/#top)
